name: system-execute
description: Execute local shell commands with risk-based safety: safe runs immediately, warning runs with warning, dangerous requires approval

alias.description: Name of a saved custom command

saveAs.description: Save command under this alias name

shell.description: Optional shell: cmd, powershell, sh, or bash

approvalId.description: Approval id for a previously approved dangerous command

approved.description: Internal approval flag; use only after explicit approval

requestedBy.description: Optional requester/source for approval audit records
